subcodes.first_line: According to the command, from the surface of the earth convey the sum of fifty túmáns to his honor Dhabíḥ of the Land of K, and whatsoever [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حسب الامر از وجه ارض خا مبلغ پنجاه تومان بجناب ذبیح ارض ک برسانید و هرچه
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
